title: erigeron bonjeani
intro: Erigeron bonjeani, also known as Mountain Fleabane, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron bonjeani include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
